content.en:
The Terran has nine supreme-level forces, plus the Terran Supreme Palace, only fifteen elixirs are naturally not enough.

Ye Tian pondered for a moment, then said, "Everyone, I have only obtained a total of fifteen elixirs that can cultivate mixed-level cultivation talents, and the Heavenly Pavilion where I am also needs this kind of elixir, so I can only produce a maximum of 13 such elixirs. In this way, I will sell 2 elixirs to the Supreme Hall of the Human Race, 2 elixirs to the Mixed Yuan Divine Mountain, 2 elixirs to the Divine Blade Alliance, and one elixir to each of the other forces. "

The forces that can only buy one elixir are naturally a little unhappy, but these elixirs are all Ye Tian, and Ye Tian can sell them to whoever he wants.

These elixirs sold by Ye Tian can be purchased by the major forces only with ordinary resources and some classic secret techniques, which is a very cost-effective deal for the major forces.

If these elixirs obtained by foreigners, if the human race wants to buy them, it will cost at least a hundred times the price, and they will not even have the opportunity to buy them.

It is only because Ye Tian is a human race that the major forces have such a advantage to take advantage of.

Half a day later.

Ye Tian had completed the deal with the major forces, and the value obtained from these 13 elixirs alone was enough to make Tiange develop for countless years.

"Ladies and gentlemen, there are some elixirs here that are of great help to you in refining your body and soul, if you want to buy them this time, you must come up with some good things, such as some supreme treasures and supreme treasures or some rare treasures obtained from the universe. "

Ye Tiandao.

Many of the supreme beings present had already cultivated to the limit, and it was very difficult to take a step forward, so the elixir that could improve their strength, they naturally wanted as much as they wanted, and they were not afraid to pay the price, but they were afraid that there would be no place to buy it.

The elixirs that Ye Tian traded out were basically of little use to himself, and he would not take them out to trade the elixirs that were really useful to him.

"Master of Ten Thousand Laws, this is an ore that I accidentally obtained in a secret realm somewhere in the universe, it is very tough, I asked several refining masters of the human race to temper it into weapons, but they all failed, it is too hard, there is no way to melt it. But just because of its incomparably strong nature, I can't destroy it, it's enough to prove its rarity, and it should be enough to exchange it for a lot of elixirs, right?"

The Mixed Yuan Supreme took out a piece of ore and said.

"Yes!"

Ye Tian nodded, but his heart was ecstatic.

The Mixed Yuan Supreme doesn't know this ore, but he does!

He had obtained Hamon's memories, which he had already digested, and he had also obtained a lot of information from the secret realm of the Hidden God Organization, so he knew some special and rare materials in the chaos and the universe.

The piece of ore taken out by the Mixed Yuan Supreme is called Immortal Divine Gold, which has an indestructible nature, and is an incomparably rare innate origin thing, just because of its solid appearance, it isolates all divine consciousness and soul power, so even the Supreme has no way to detect the origin breath inside it, and only thinks that it is some kind of ore.

"I don't know how many times more precious the Immortal Divine Gold is than the innate light source, but it's a pity that I don't have the Great Divine Power corresponding to the Immortal Divine Gold, otherwise it is enough to practice a top-notch Great Divine Power that is even more powerful than the Constant Light Divine Power!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

It can be said that this piece of Immortal Divine Gold alone is enough to buy all the elixirs on his body, and even far more.

But Ye Tian wouldn't tell the truth, otherwise, the Mixed Yuan Supreme might not sell this piece of Immortal God Gold.

Of course.

Ye Tian also gave this piece of Immortal God Gold a bit higher, which made the Mixed Yuan Supreme happy, and in this way, everyone was very happy.

Subsequently.

The other supremes also took out good things one by one, although they were not as precious as the Immortal God Gold, they were all good things, and Ye Tian gained a lot.

Before the meeting ended, Ye Tian reminded: "Ladies and gentlemen, don't think that I have obtained so many good things in the misty region, so you rush into the misty region. To tell you the truth, the reason why I was able to find so many good things was because my life level had reached the seventh order and I possessed some special abilities. If you do not reach the seventh life, do not attempt to enter the misty area. Even in the inner area of the Mist Zone, there are even Mist Beasts that are comparable to the Second Order Supreme. What is even more terrifying is the core area, where there is a real great terror, where many mist beasts comparable to second-class supremes or even first-class supremes live, and even far beyond the existence of first-class supremes. It can even be said that even if those supremes of the Twelve Universe Era dare to enter the misty region, once they escape slowly, they will all die!"

Kunwu Supreme hurriedly said: "Master of Ten Thousand Laws, don't worry, we will not enter the misty region!"

The other supremes also assured one by one that even if a few supremes wanted to go in and give it a try, but when they heard Ye Tian say this, they naturally extinguished the idea of going in.

The misty region even has beings that surpass the first-class supreme, isn't it enough to destroy them with just one look?

The Supremes left, and Ye Tian also went back to retreat.

Heavenly Pavilion.

Ye Tian first put the resources he had traded into the treasure house of the Heavenly Pavilion, and then handed over some cultivation resources to his wife Xiao Yue and sister Ye Yu, and then truly entered the retreat.

In this retreat, he was ready to raise the Chaos Golden Desolation Technique to the eighth level of perfection.

Time passed slowly, and in the blink of an eye, 3,000 years passed.

......

Retreat Chamber.

The elixir was suspended around Ye Tian, and as Ye Tian breathed, the elixir lost its medicinal power and turned into ashes.

At the same time, Ye Tian's body was constantly getting stronger, and the limit of his body was advancing in waves, reaching an incredible point.

Rumble!!!

Ye Tian ushered in a complete transformation, at this moment, he had completely cultivated the Chaos Golden Desolation Technique to the eighth layer of the Perfection Realm, and the strength of his physical body had also advanced to the extreme, and there was no way to advance any further.

"My body is strong enough to sweep the universe!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Now, his strength has also improved a lot, and he has almost reached the extreme of the fourth-rank supreme, and he is only one step away from stepping into the ranks of the third-rank supreme.

If he chooses to break through to the Heavenly Venerable realm now, he will directly step into several supreme levels, and he is not sure.

Dominating to Tianzun is a huge breakthrough, and the deeper the accumulation, the largest increase in strength after the breakthrough.

If it was before, Ye Tian would have chosen to break through now, but with the memory of Hamon and the inheritance of the Tibetan God Organization, Ye Tian knew very well the difference between the Earth Venerable Powerhouse and the Universe Supreme in the chaos.

In the midst of chaos, some powerful Earth Venerables far surpassed other Earth Venerables, and were even enough to compete with the powerhouses of the Heavenly Mandate Realm, although they relied on the accumulation of countless years and many top-notch divine powers, they also had an advantage that other Earth Venerables did not have, that is, the semi-chaotic life body!

The Heavenly Mandate powerhouses are all chaotic lifeforms, but if the Earth Venerable powerhouse chooses to break through in a place where the chaotic vitality is extremely strong and even contains a trace of chaotic origin aura, it is very likely to condense the body of semi-chaotic life, and the physical body will get an incomparably terrifying increase.

Ye Tian didn't know it, but now that he knew this secret, he naturally wanted to try to condense the semi-chaotic life body when he hit the realm of Tianzun.

"The universe is no better than chaos, there are many such places in chaos, but such places in the universe are too rare. "

Ye Tian muttered.

Rare does not mean that there is none, because the universe is also part of chaos, and there are theoretically such places.

Next, Ye Tian began to collect intelligence, mainly to collect treasures that are most likely to contain the aura of the origin of chaos, even if it is not, it doesn't matter, it's just a big deal.

A hundred years later.

The three places are in line with Ye Tian's intelligence, but whether it is specific or not, he needs to confirm it in person.

this day.

Ye Tian left the Terrans!
